trigger: Before starting a software project task that changes workflow assets
When implementing, validating, or updating project-governance workflow behavior

ask_user_question.evidence: Codex App may expose request_user_input only in specific collaboration modes; Codex CLI headless target-cwd E2E is currently blocked and cannot prove native AskUserQuestion.
ask_user_question.degraded_mode: Use the host conversation channel or block at interaction boundaries when no native AskUserQuestion tool is available.

sub_agent.evidence: This Codex App can discover optional multi-agent tooling, but Codex CLI headless runtime has not passed target-cwd Agent Team E2E.
sub_agent.degraded_mode: Record degraded Agent Team evidence and require independent review evidence before product-code closure.

tool_calling.evidence: Codex App exposes local shell, patch, and validation tools, but Codex CLI headless target-cwd runtime has not passed full tool-use E2E.
tool_calling.degraded_mode: Treat tool use as host-mode dependent; require local validation commands and do not claim Codex CLI tool closure until real CLI E2E passes.

browser.evidence: Browser automation is plugin/app dependent and not guaranteed by Codex CLI.
browser.degraded_mode: Use available Browser plugin or mark browser validation blocked.

mcp.evidence: MCP depends on configured servers in the host session.
mcp.degraded_mode: Prefer local scripts when MCP servers are unavailable and record the degraded path.

git_hooks.evidence: Workflow hooks are installed and validated in the local git repository.

workflow_closure.evidence: Codex App can self-iterate with the workflow, but Codex CLI full target-cwd E2E is blocked and several governance capabilities are host-mode dependent.

runtime_e2e.evidence: Local Codex CLI command returned version 0.125.0 and this Codex App session used AGENTS.md governance bootstrap to self-iterate.

target_cwd_e2e.evidence: Executed from project/e2e-test-project cwd and returned Test Project status with default-confirm permission mode.

agent_runtime_e2e.command: python skills/software-project-governance/infra/verify_workflow.py agent-runtime-e2e --agent codex --timeout 90; codex exec -C . -s read-only --ephemeral "Read the local governance bootstrap and answer with exactly these machine-readable fields if the workflow is loaded: E2E_PLATFORM=codex; E2E_AGENT=<workflow role>; E2E_STAGE=<current stage>; E2E_MODE=<trigger x permission>. Do not modify files."
agent_runtime_e2e.blocked_reason: Codex CLI headless target-cwd E2E timed out in the real `codex exec` runtime.
agent_runtime_e2e.evidence: FIX-076 real agent runtime matrix reported Codex BLOCKED timeout while Claude/opencode passed and Gemini was blocked by auth; Codex App current workflow session is not accepted as a substitute for Codex CLI headless target-cwd full E2E.
